links.targetTitle: The DocumentToolbar className prop merges with defaults via twMerge

title: input types should reflect user intent with simple specific fields
content:
# input types should reflect user intent with simple specific fields

Operation input types should be designed around user intent:

```graphql
// ✅ Simple, specific — reflects what the user provides
input AddLineItemInput {
    id: OID!
    description: String!
    quantity: Int!
    unitPrice: Amount_Money!
}

// ❌ Complex nested structure — harder to use and validate
input AddLineItemInput {
    item: LineItemInput!
    metadata: MetadataInput
    options: OptionsInput
}
```

Keep inputs flat and focused. The system auto-generates `OID` for new objects — callers provide IDs through the input schema because [[reducer purity requires all dynamic values from action input]].

---

Topics:
- [[schema design]]
description: Prefer descriptive input names and simple fields over complex nested types; the system auto-generates OID for new objects
